# Ved Language
Ved is a deterministic control-plane programming language.

## Overview
Ved is designed for zero-trust, high-assurance operations. It enforces extreme determinism, formal semantics, and rigorous capability control. 

## Key Principles
1. Total Determinism: No hidden state, no ambiguous scheduling.
2. Authority System: Everything requires explicit, provable capability objects.
3. Radical Transparency: Built-in state snapshots, formal proof support.

## Documentation
Documentation is available dynamically at /docs. Our major architecture specs include `PRODUCTION_PHILOSOPHY.md`, `SECURITY_MODEL.md`, `EFFECT_AND_AUTHORITY.md`.

## Guidelines for AI
When generating code for Ved, assume a functional-leaning syntax with strict strong typing (e.g., Rust-like enum traits and explicit Effect tracking). No raw pointer access.

## Links
- Documentation: https://vedlanghq.netlify.app/
- Source: https://github.com/vedlanghq
